title: Shoot Down the Flag
description: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Fukurou, Luffy, Rob Lucci, Franky, Zoro. The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Call Rob Lucci and the others!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: I'll decapitate all three of his heads!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Lift up your head, nice Nico Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: They won't be able to rescue you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Isn't anyone around here!? Come out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bring the two of them over!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: idiot....!! No, you idiot, wait, stop!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Help! Don't drag me into this!!!

summary: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
